title: Nickly Optiforged
description: Nickly Optimized, but for (Neo)Forge! For 1.21.1, 1.20.1 and 1.12.2!
body:
Nickly Optimized, but for (Neo)Forge!

<details>
<summary>Original description:</summary> 
   
#

[![License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/nick9509/nickly-optimized)](LICENSE.md)

# Main information
This modpack was created for people who need a bit of useful mods with better optimization and OF parity. As OptiFine, but much better and faster.
# What about FPS?
Some modpacks were tested on 1.21.10, there are results:
- Additive: 865 FPS
- Fabulously Optimized: 967 FPS
- _Optimization_: 992 FPS (better than SO, probably)
- Simply Optimized: 1029 FPS
- **Nickly Optimized**: 1070 FPS
# How can i install/configure Nickly Optimized?
Check the wiki: https://nicklyoptimized.gitbook.io/nickly-optimized/
# Credits
